Static reference

UI components mapped to Movemental tokens

Production uses shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4 in src/components/ui/*; this page approximates the same roles with plain HTML for Stitch handoff and static QA. Prefer wrapping shadcn primitives in React rather than copying these class names verbatim.

Typography

Inter only; display uses tight tracking per DESIGN.md.

Eyebrow

Display small

Body emphasis line.

Muted prose for descriptions. Inline code and ⌘ K for affordances.

Buttons

Primary uses the allowed 135deg gradient; secondary is elevated, not another hue.

Primary

Text button: Evidence overview →

Form controls

Borders use --border; focus rings use primary mix — same contract as shadcn defaults.

Illustrative validation message.
Budget band:

Cards & badges

Ghost lift: cards on section bands get ambient shadow per shared theme rules.

Card title

Body copy inside a marketing card. No decorative border — tonal contrast carries separation.

With footer meta

Secondary line for captions or provenance.

Updated April 2026 · Draft

Neutral Primary Outline

Alerts & evidence note

For grounded citations, prefer the shared .evidence-note primitive from site-theme.css.

Info. Short operational message — deployment window, copy freeze, or migration status.
Risk. Destructive or irreversible action preview; pair with confirmation in product UI.

Source

Pew Research Center, “Illustrative citation only” — link to primary URL in production.

Retrieved 2026-04-01 · Sample caveat: not longitudinal.

Tabs (CSS-only)

Radio group controls panels; first tab selected by default. In React, use Radix Tabs.

High-level promise and who it is for. Keep one idea per paragraph; link outward for proofs.
Dense tables belong here, not in Overview — preserves scan-friendly first tab.
Ship notes: token tweaks, dependency bumps, and disclosure copy changes.

Accordion

Native details is accessible and works without JS; use shadcn Accordion when you need animation + controlled state.

What ships in the first slice?

IA, voice layer scaffolding, and one public route group wired to your domain — no “big bang” rewrite.

How do you handle model disclosure?

Surface where AI assisted, link methodology, and keep human-reviewed sources adjacent to generated summaries.

Table

Zebra striping uses section mix — still no outer box border on whole sections, only the wrapped table chrome.

Deliverable Owner Status
Voice markers doc Editorial In review
Auth + roles Systems Shipped
Evidence band Design Queued

Avatar & separator

JS

Jordan Smith

Program lead · placeholder

Use real images in production; initials are a fallback only.
